description: MCP server for AWS S3 with fine-grained tool control and S3-compatible endpoint support.
name: com.pulsemcp/s3

environmentVariables.description: AWS access key ID for authentication.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: AWS secret access key for authentication.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL for MinIO or S3-compatible services.
environmentVariables.name: AWS_ENDPOINT_URL

environmentVariables.description: Use path-style addressing instead of virtual-hosted-style.
environmentVariables.name: S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE

environmentVariables.description: Constrain all operations to a single bucket.
environmentVariables.name: S3_BUCKET

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups: readonly or readwrite.
environmentVariables.name: S3_ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS

environmentVariables.description: Skip AWS credential validation health checks at startup.
environmentVariables.name: SKIP_HEALTH_CHECKS
